Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Minor's Compromise Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; CSR: M. Baldocchi #5207.

Derek Jacobson, Esq. for Petitioner(s): Robert Steiner, as guardian ad litem for: Robert Kelly Knickerbocker Bennett, a minor Claimant. Andrew Bennett (Plaintiff/father) is also present in court. Petitioner was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Attorney's fees: $9,806.88
Medical expenses total $8,933.00
Reimbursement of litigation costs and expenses total $965.60
A net balance of $30,294.52 shall be invested in a structured settlement annuity, subject to withdrawal only upon Order of the Court, or until the Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order signed by Judge Chaitin.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
